The '''battle''' of [[Hyber Canyon]] was a skirmish between the [[Jabiimi Nationalists]] and the [[Jabiimi Loyalists]] in [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]]. The Loyalists, under [[Orliss Gillmunn]], tried to capture the Nationalist headquarters, but failed. [[Dunaub]] led a [[Platoon/Legends|platoon]] in the battle.

==Appearances==
*[[Empire 32|''Empire'' 32]] {{1stm}}
